title: Section 32
content: No suit, prosecution or other legal proceedings shall lie against 1[the Reserve Bank or the Central Registry or any secured creditor or any of its officers] for anything done or omitted to be done in good faith under this Act.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 44 of 2016, s. 24, for "any secured creditor or any of his officers or manager exercising any of the rights of the secured creditor or borrower" (w.e.f. 1-9-2016).
